{
  "judge_id": "Judge-001",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.4": 4,
    "R1.7": 3,
    "RX.1": 2,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 1
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "The agent identifies three prior works and articulates the delta by contrasting against the closest prior crowdsourced robot-motion studies.",
    "R1.7": "The agent flags one missing citation for the Diffusion Policy, but audits every load-bearing citation for the other two.",
    "RX.1": "The agent does not mark confidence or missing evidence for each recommendation.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).",
    "RX.4": "No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original by pointing out the omission of a baseline and specific prior-work names.",
    "RX.5": "Output blends sources without traceability."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.4": 0.9,
    "R1.7": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 0.6,
    "RX.3": 1.0,
    "RX.4": 1.0,
    "RX.5": 0.5
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: The agent identifies three prior works and articulates the delta by contrasting against the closest prior crowdsourced robot-motion studies.
rationale.R1.7: The agent flags one missing citation for the Diffusion Policy, but audits every load-bearing citation for the other two.
rationale.RX.1: The agent does not mark confidence or missing evidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original by pointing out the omission of a baseline and specific prior-work names.
